Frontier-orbital (HOMO–LUMO) gap for TEMPO (3.8724203 eV)

Method provenance
• Property: HOMO–LUMO (Koopmans) gap = 3.8724203 eV
• Level of theory: DFT, tier “standard” = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI density fitting (PySCF UKS)
• Geometry provenance: single-point on the provided Cartesian geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz); no re-optimization (DFT//fixed-geom)
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
• Charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet open shell)
• Software: PySCF via chemkit `frontier-orbitals` skill
• Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 12 cycles; no engine warnings reported.
• Live log: calculation was streamed to a file named frontier-orbitals_<timestamp>.out in the working directory (path was displayed at run launch); final structured result written to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp_pxoz8y9/live.json.

No warnings were reported by the engine; integrity check status: ok (trustworthy).
